Title: Intune Autopilot Configuration & Enrollment Profiles
Description: Configure Windows Autopilot deployment profiles in Microsoft Intune for AFFG's 9 company laptops. Create the Autopilot profile with user-driven mode, OOBE customization (Technijian branding, skip privacy/EULA pages), and Entra ID join. Register all 9 device hardware hashes. Verify Autopilot readiness for each device serial number.

Title: Intune Device Compliance Policies
Description: Create Intune compliance policies for Windows 11 laptops: require BitLocker encryption, Windows Defender ATP active, firewall enabled, minimum OS version, screen lock timeout (15 min), antivirus definitions current. Configure non-compliance action: mark non-compliant after 1 day, block M365 access via Conditional Access integration.

Title: Intune Device Configuration Profiles
Description: Deploy Intune configuration profiles for the 9 managed laptops: BitLocker silent encryption (XTS-AES 256), Windows Defender ATP onboarding, Windows Firewall rules, Windows Update for Business (monthly quality + quarterly feature), password/PIN complexity policies, and telemetry settings. Test profile application on pilot device before fleet deployment.

Title: Laptop Autopilot Enrollment & Imaging (9 Devices)
Description: Execute Autopilot enrollment for all 9 AFFG company laptops. Each device: factory reset, connect to internet, run Autopilot OOBE, verify Entra ID join, confirm Intune enrollment, validate all compliance policies applied (BitLocker, Defender, firewall, patches). Document device serial, Entra device ID, and compliance state.

Title: Endpoint Security Stack Deployment (9 Laptops)
Description: Deploy the full Technijian endpoint security stack to all 9 managed laptops: CrowdStrike Falcon EDR, Huntress Managed Detection, Cisco Umbrella DNS Filtering, ManageEngine Patch Management, ConnectWise ScreenConnect. Verify agent check-in for each product on all 9 devices. Test CrowdStrike with EICAR, confirm Huntress 24/7 monitoring.

Title: MyAudit UAM+DLP Agent Deployment on Managed Laptops
Description: Install and configure MyAudit UAM+DLP agent on all 9 managed laptops. Configure DLP policies: block USB/external storage, block local download of regulated data, block print-to-local, block clipboard copy to unmanaged apps, block screen capture. Verify 1-year retention policy. Validate detection accuracy with test scenarios.

Title: SSO/2FA Gateway Deployment on Managed Endpoints
Description: Deploy and configure Technijian SSO/2FA gateway on all 9 managed laptops for custodian bank portals (Schwab Advisor Services, Interactive Brokers) and non-M365 regulated systems. Verify MFA enforcement and session logging per Reg S-P 2024 amendments.

Title: Credential Manager Deployment
Description: Deploy Technijian Credential Manager to all 9 managed laptops. Configure vault with Schwab, IBKR, and M365 credentials. Verify auto-fill and session tracking for regulated portals.

Title: Conditional Access Policy Suite
Description: Configure Entra ID Conditional Access policy suite for managed-device model: Policy 1 — Require Intune-compliant device for M365 access (Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams) across all platforms. Policy 2 — Block legacy authentication (IMAP, POP3, SMTP AUTH, Exchange ActiveSync). Policy 3 — Require MFA for all sign-ins. Apply to all 31 M365 users. Test personal device blocking and legacy auth rejection.

Title: CloudBrink ZTNA Tenant & Connector Setup
Description: Provision CloudBrink ZTNA tenant for AFFG. Deploy CloudBrink connector (edge appliance) integrated with AFFG network. Configure identity provider integration with Microsoft Entra ID for SSO. Define application resources: M365, Schwab Advisor Services, Interactive Brokers TWS, internal file shares. Reg S-P 248.30(a)(3); NIST AC-17, SC-7.

Title: CloudBrink Agent Deployment to 9 Managed Laptops
Description: Deploy CloudBrink ZTNA agent to all 9 managed laptops via Intune app deployment (Win32 app package). Configure per-user ZTNA policies: device posture check (Intune compliance + BitLocker + Defender active) required per session. Verify agent auto-start, silent authentication via Entra SSO, and per-application micro-segmented access.

Title: CloudBrink Access Policies & Micro-Segmentation
Description: Configure CloudBrink per-application access policies: Schwab Advisor Services (HTTPS only), Interactive Brokers (TWS + IBKR Web), M365 suite, internal file shares. Enable per-session device posture verification. Configure session logging (user, device, app, duration, source IP). Block lateral movement between applications.

Title: Schwab & IBKR Access Migration (Office IP Whitelist to ZTNA)
Description: Coordinate with Schwab Advisor Services and Interactive Brokers to transition custodian access from AFFG's existing office-IP whitelist to CloudBrink ZTNA-based access. Submit updated access configurations to each custodian, validate ZTNA-routed connections to both custodians from multiple network locations (office, home, travel), and confirm the legacy office-IP entries can be removed from each custodian's allowlist after cutover.

Title: Intune MDM Enrollment for Company Phones (9 Devices)
Description: Enroll all 9 AFFG company phones in Microsoft Intune MDM. Configure enrollment profiles: require encryption, PIN/biometric, minimum OS version, jailbreak/root detection. Verify each phone shows compliant in Intune portal. Included in M365 E3 — no additional license cost.

Title: Intune App Protection (MAM) Policies for Mobile
Description: Create and deploy Intune App Protection Policies for Outlook, OneDrive, Teams, and Edge on company phones. Block: copy/paste to personal apps, save-as to personal storage, screenshots of corporate content. Require: PIN/biometric for corporate apps. Auto-wipe: on jailbreak detection or 30 days offline. Test containerization on pilot device.

Title: Mobile Remote Wipe & Termination Procedures
Description: Configure selective wipe (corporate data only) and full wipe (factory reset) capabilities for all 9 company phones. Document the termination procedure: HR notifies Technijian, Technijian executes selective or full wipe within 1 hour, wipe confirmation logged. Test wipe on pilot device. Configure auto-wipe triggers for jailbreak and extended offline.

Title: User Data Migration to Managed Laptops
Description: Migrate user data, application settings, browser bookmarks, and Outlook profiles from each of the 9 users' existing work devices to their corresponding new managed laptop. Coordinate with each user to schedule the cutover, capture required data, and validate post-migration. Verify Outlook mail/calendar, OneDrive sync, Teams sign-in, browser bookmarks, and line-of-business application access on the managed laptop.

Title: User Training — Managed Device Workflow
Description: Conduct training sessions for all 9 AFFG users on the managed device workflow: laptop sign-in with Entra ID + MFA, CloudBrink ZTNA auto-connect, Schwab/IBKR access via CloudBrink, MyAudit DLP restrictions (no USB/download/print), phone MDM enrollment and app containerization, what to do if device is lost/stolen. Produce a quick-reference guide for the managed-device workflow.

Title: Pilot Operation Window (2–3 Users on Managed Laptops)
Description: Run a 2-week pilot operation window with 2–3 designated AFFG users operating on the new managed laptops while the remaining users continue on their existing devices. Pilot users exercise all workflows (M365, Schwab, IBKR, internal shares) across multiple network locations. Monitor CloudBrink connectivity, DLP events, Conditional Access blocks, and user friction. Resolve issues before full fleet cutover.

Title: Legacy Office-IP Whitelist Decommission
Description: After all 9 users have cut over to managed laptops and ZTNA-based custodian access is validated: coordinate with Schwab Advisor Services and Interactive Brokers to remove AFFG's office-IP entries from each custodian's allowlist. Verify that custodian access now requires a posture-verified managed device via CloudBrink. Document the final-state access architecture for the compliance binder.

Title: Monitoring Expansion — Device Fleet & CloudBrink
Description: Expand the existing monthly compliance assessment to include: Intune device fleet monitoring (all 9 laptops + 9 phones enrolled, encrypted, patched, checking in), CloudBrink agent status (active, posture checks passing, unauthorized access attempts), Conditional Access sign-in analytics. Update the monthly compliance dashboard PDF template to reflect the managed-device architecture.

Title: Monthly Mobile Device Audit Configuration
Description: Configure the monthly mobile device audit: enrolled device count vs. headcount, compliance violations, wipe history, jailbreak detection events. Fold into existing Technijian assessment cadence per FINRA 3110(c) and 3120. Produce audit evidence template for regulator presentation.

Title: End-to-End Security Validation
Description: End-to-end validation of the managed device control stack: attempt M365 access from personal device (should block), attempt USB data exfiltration (MyAudit should block), attempt legacy auth (should block), attempt CloudBrink bypass (should fail), attempt access with non-compliant device (should block). Document results for compliance binder.

Title: Post-Deployment Compliance Gap Assessment
Description: Conduct a gap assessment verifying that every citation in the Control-to-Citation Map (Reg S-P, FINRA 3110, FINRA 4370, SEC 17a-4, NIST 800-53) is met by the deployed managed-device architecture. Compare deployed controls against the SOW Section 3 commitments. Document any residual gaps and remediation ownership. Store evidence in the compliance binder.

Title: Compliance Documentation Suite
Description: Produce the compliance documentation suite aligned with the managed-device architecture: Incident Response Plan (IRP) referencing managed endpoints + CloudBrink, Business Continuity / Disaster Recovery disclosure, Service Provider Oversight (including CloudBrink as an assessed vendor), supervisory audit-trail architecture (endpoint + CloudBrink + Intune model). Cover Reg S-P 2024, FINRA 3110/4370, SEC 17a-4, NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5.

Title: Schedule A Amendment — Consolidate to 9 Managed Laptops + Add Managed Control Services
Description: Draft Schedule A amendment to MSA-AFFG-2026: (a) consolidate the existing desktop security stack (AVD, AVMH, SI, PMW, MR) from 16 units to 9 units aligned to the 9 managed laptops (-$185.50/mo), (b) add the managed-device control services — MyAudit UAM+DLP (AMDLP1Y) × 9, SSO/2FA (SSO-2FA) × 9, Credential Manager (CRM) × 9 (+$1,125.90/mo). Net monthly change: +$940.40/mo (from signed $2,794.50/mo to $3,734.90/mo). Intune for laptops and phones is included in M365 E3 — no additional Technijian charge. CloudBrink subscription is AFFG-procured.
